issues.description: Effect text says 'Negate the effect' of opponent's Character, but DSL uses Rest action. Negate is not implemented in current actions list; Rest is incorrect translation. Should clarify intended mechanic or use appropriate action.
Rest action targets opponent's Character, but Rest typically affects your own characters. Negate mechanic should target opponent's Character effect, not rest it.
Condition uses HasRestingDon with count:1, but card text indicates optional payment ('You may return...'). Should use optional modifier or adjust condition to reflect choice.

Two sequential actions both target 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' with maxPower:5000, but second action (KO) should only execute if first condition (Negate) succeeds. Conditional chaining may need clarification.
